note: Legal Freelance pipeline scrape. Sources: Latitude Legal, Axiom Law, Cimplifi, fractionaljobs.io, ACC Jobline, Built In, Glassdoor, ZipRecruiter, Indeed (via web search). Excluded Lyfecoin (posted Apr 25 — outside 7-day window and listing marked expired), Socket (job removed), Sleep Doctor (healthcare-only fit, posted Apr 17), Hayden Industrial (already captured 5/15), Found and Podean (both marked Closed), and the previously-captured Ontra freelance fund-formation listing (in 5/15 report). All leads here are net-new vs. legal-freelance-scrape-2026-05-12, -14, -15, and -18 reports.

leads.name: Axiom Law — Securities & Prime Brokerage Counsel (Remote, US)
leads.industry: Alternative Legal Services Provider (ALSP) / Financial Services placements
leads.location: US - New York (remote-friendly via Axiom secondment model)

fitDetails.practice_area: Securities & prime brokerage — fund-adjacent (margin lending, Reg T/U, FINRA 4210, cross-asset derivatives/swaps with hedge fund and asset manager counterparties)
fitDetails.seniority: Counsel-level; 3+ years securities/prime brokerage; sized for senior judgment
fitDetails.comp_credible: Yes — $104,500–$325,000 annualized for attorney roles; secondment hourly basis
fitDetails.fund_focus: Indirect but strong — clients are financial institutions servicing private funds and asset managers

intentDetails.remote_flex: Remote engagements supported nationally per Axiom platform
intentDetails.recency: Listed as existing vacancy; Axiom keeps roles active and rotates lawyers in continuously
intentDetails.apply_path: Direct apply on Axiom careers portal

leads.compensationText: $104,500–$325,000 estimated total comp for attorneys (Axiom secondment, hourly billable model)
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Axiom secondment / contract attorney (FT or PT)
signals: Prime brokerage / margin lending — fund-counterparty work
Securities Act of 1933 / Exchange Act of 1934 expertise required
Cross-asset (swaps, options, futures, equities, fixed income) — sophisticated counterparties
Axiom Funds practice has 25-year track record placing remote, hourly funds lawyers
Permira-backed ALSP — ongoing pipeline of similar roles, good network entry point
leads.notes: Bucket B (interim/secondment) + Bucket C (consultant) qualifier. Even if this specific seat isn't ideal, applying gets Katie into Axiom's Funds practice bench — Axiom rotates lawyers into private funds, asset management, and PE work continuously. Strong network-effect lead. Pitch angle: corporate/fund counsel with margin-lending and securities adjacency.

leads.name: Cimplifi — Part-Time Corporate Attorney, M&A ($125/hr, Remote)
leads.industry: ALSP / Legal staffing into mid-size law firm (premier firm client; Fortune 100 and emerging-company representations)

fitDetails.practice_area: M&A / Corporate — mid-size firm overflow into M&A transactions
fitDetails.seniority: Mid-to-senior associate (3–5 years), corporate associate at mid/large firm with M&A focus
fitDetails.comp_credible: Yes — $125/hour, market for PT contract M&A work
fitDetails.fund_focus: Indirect — M&A practice typically supports PE/portfolio-company transactions; client represents both Fortune 100 and emerging companies

intentDetails.engagement_model: Part-time contract via Cimplifi ALSP — IC/W2 contract
intentDetails.recency: Actively posted on Glassdoor as of mid-May 2026
intentDetails.apply_path: Glassdoor / Cimplifi careers — easy apply path

leads.employmentTypeRaw: Part-time contract, ~3 months with potential extension; W-2 with benefits eligibility
signals: Premier mid-size law firm client (overflow buyer — classic ICP)
Direct M&A practice, not litigation/diligence-only
Stated hourly rate ($125/hr) — credible market comp, removes haggling friction
~3 month engagement with extension potential — meaningful runway
Eastern Time Zone preferred — fits Katie's NY base
leads.notes: Bucket A (PT / hourly) + Bucket D (corporate attorney embedded into firm). Clean fit on engagement model and seniority. Pitch angle: senior corporate counsel with PE/fund-adjacent M&A experience, NY-based, available for part-time overflow.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Corporate Attorney, Securities & Corporate Governance (Remote Contract #5077)
leads.industry: ALSP / flexible legal staffing into corporate legal departments and law firms
leads.fundingStage: Established (Chambers NewLaw Guide-ranked flexible legal staffing firm)

fitDetails.practice_area: Corporate securities & governance — SEC reporting/disclosures, NYSE listing standards, corporate approvals, governance matters
fitDetails.seniority: Counsel-level; prior experience in BigLaw corporate practice or major company corporate legal department preferred
fitDetails.fund_focus: Adjacent — Latitude routes contract attorneys into both fund managers and operating companies; this seat is corporate/securities for leading corporations

intentDetails.engagement_model: Remote contract engagement (W-2 with benefits at 20+ hr/week)
intentDetails.recency: Open opportunity on jobs portal as of 2026-05-19

leads.employmentTypeRaw: Remote Contract Engagement (W-2; full benefits at 20+ hrs/week)
signals: Net-new Latitude posting — prior reports captured #5073, 5075, 5076; this is #5077
Securities and corporate governance — sweet-spot Katie practice area
BigLaw / major-company corporate legal preferred — Katie profile fit
W-2 contract with benefits at 20+ hrs/week — favorable structure
Latitude's NY office is active and engaged — same channel as previous Latitude leads
leads.notes: Bucket A (contract) + Bucket D (corporate attorney) qualifier. Direct fit. Pitch angle: senior corporate/securities counsel available for multi-month remote engagement with leading public companies.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Financial Services Regulatory Attorney (Remote #5058)
leads.industry: ALSP / flexible legal staffing into investment companies and advisers

fitDetails.practice_area: Private funds, mutual funds, variable life/annuity products — financial services regulatory & compliance for investment companies and advisers
fitDetails.seniority: 5+ years financial services regulatory experience; AmLaw 200 firm or major-company legal department preferred
fitDetails.comp_credible: Law firm-level compensation; W-2 with benefits at 20+ hrs
fitDetails.fund_focus: Direct — private funds and mutual funds explicitly named; investment advisers as buyers

intentDetails.engagement_model: Remote contract engagement, full- or part-time
intentDetails.recency: Open opportunity, listed on Latitude jobs portal

leads.compensationText: Law firm-level compensation; benefits-eligible at 20+ hrs/week; complimentary professional liability insurance
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Remote Contract Engagement, full- or part-time (W-2)
signals: Explicitly private funds, mutual funds, and investment adviser counsel work — bulls-eye ICP
AmLaw 200 / major-company legal preferred — Katie profile fit
Net-new Latitude posting — not in prior reports
Full- or part-time flexibility opens door to layering with other engagements
Sophisticated financial products — exactly the high-judgment work the ICP describes
leads.notes: Bucket A (contract) + Bucket B (interim/part-time) + Bucket D (counsel) — qualifies on all primary engagement-model buckets. Highest fit-score lead in this batch. Pitch angle: corporate/fund counsel for investment companies and advisers, available for multi-month part-time contract.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Financial Services Consulting Attorney (Remote #5723)
leads.industry: ALSP / flexible legal staffing — financial services consulting

fitDetails.practice_area: Financial services regulatory & compliance consulting — private funds, mutual funds, variable life/annuity products
fitDetails.seniority: 5+ years financial services regulatory and/or compliance experience; AmLaw 200 / major-company legal preferred
fitDetails.comp_credible: Latitude-standard competitive compensation; W-2 with benefits at 20+ hrs
fitDetails.fund_focus: Direct — same product universe as #5058 (private funds + mutual funds), framed as consulting engagement

intentDetails.engagement_model: Remote consulting engagement, full- or part-time contract
intentDetails.remote_flex: Fully remote (or on-site at client option)
intentDetails.recency: Open opportunity, higher Latitude job ID (5723) than the established 5000-range — likely newer posting

leads.compensationText: Competitive law firm-level compensation; benefits-eligible at 20+ hrs/week
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Remote Consulting / Contract Engagement (W-2; FT or PT)
signals: Companion role to #5058 — Latitude appears to be staffing-up a financial services regulatory bench
Consulting framing rather than embedded contract — broader scope, shorter sprints likely
Private funds and mutual funds explicitly in scope
Higher job ID suggests posted more recently than #5058
Same Latitude relationship as prior leads — leverages existing recruiter pipeline
leads.notes: Bucket B (consultant) + Bucket C (consulting). Apply alongside #5058 — Latitude tends to slot the same candidate against multiple openings if fit is strong. Pitch angle: senior fund-formation/regulatory counsel available for consulting projects with investment managers.
